verdict: PARTIAL — shape=panel_summary, sign matches but magnitude below threshold; |Δ_log|=0; threshold 40.0%, observed 0.0%
verdict_reason: shape=panel_summary, sign matches but magnitude below threshold; |Δ_log|=0; threshold 40.0%, observed 0.0%
falsification_rule_text: Descriptive — falsified by counter-fact, not statistical inference. Falsified if (a) Russia share of EU gas imports in 2024 is > 30% (would refute the "pivot" claim), OR (b) US LNG to EU 2024 < 30 bcm (would refute the LNG-replacement claim), OR (c) Norwegian pipeline exports did NOT rise above 2018-2021 mean (would refute the Norwegian-substitute claim), OR (d) net new regasification capacity < 20 bcm/yr added 2022-2024 (would refute the infrastructure- response claim). Hypothesis declared "supported" if 4 of 4 verified; "partial" if 3 of 4; "refuted" if ≤ 2 of 4.

variables_loaded.name: russia_share_eu_gas_imports
variables_loaded.source: constructed: Eurostat nrg_te_gas EU extra-EU imports by partner; Russian share = (RUS LNG + RUS pipeline) / total. Cross-check Bruegel EU gas dashboard.

variables_loaded.name: eu_lng_regasification_capacity_bcm_yr
variables_loaded.source: constructed: GIE (Gas Infrastructure Europe) ALSI regasification capacity by terminal; new FSRU additions DEU/NLD/ITA/FRA 2022-2024. Manual-drop pending.

variables_loaded.name: post_sept_2022_dummy
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from 2022-10 onwards (Nord Stream sabotage September 2022, formal end of Russian pipeline supply except for limited Turkstream + Yamal-Europe transit).

variables_loaded.name: post_repower_eu_dummy
variables_loaded.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from 2022-05 (REPowerEU plan announcement) — secondary treatment marking policy framework rather than physical event.

variables_missing.name: log_us_lng_exports_to_eu_bcm
variables_missing.source: constructed: EIA monthly LNG exports by destination + EU LNG cargo arrivals (Kpler / ICIS / Bruegel). Manual-drop pending under data/manual/derived/.

variables_missing.name: log_norway_pipeline_exports_to_eu_bcm
variables_missing.source: constructed: Gassco / Norway petroleum directorate monthly pipeline exports by terminal. Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: eu_gas_storage_filling_pct
variables_missing.source: constructed: AGSI+ EU gas storage filling level, country-month. Manual-drop pending.

variables_missing.name: log_ttf_gas_price
variables_missing.source: constructed: Dutch TTF spot, monthly average. eex fetcher pending or manual-drop.

variables_missing.name: log_global_lng_demand
variables_missing.source: constructed: GIIGNL annual LNG trade report — global LNG imports. Manual-drop pending.
